title: GraphiteGr
description: A structural, lightweight optimization pack designed for Builders and SMPs. High FPS, low drag, precision tools.
body:
Graphite

Lightweight. Structural. Optimized.

--- ### 🛑 The Struggle I built **Graphite** for one simple reason: **I play on a bad PC.** I know exactly what it feels like to freeze when you open your inventory, or to have your game stutter just because you turned around too fast. I know the pain of trying to be a technical builder when your hardware can barely handle the chunks loading. ### ⚡ The Solution This pack is my personal answer to 10 FPS. It strips away everything unnecessary and replaces it with the most powerful optimization tools available (Sodium, Lithium, Entity Culling). If you are tired of lag holding you back, this is for you. ### 🛠️ Main Features * **Atomic Performance:** Squeezes every possible frame out of low-end hardware. * **Builder Utilities:** Litematica, MiniHUD, and precise tools for technical players. * **Zero Bloat:** No filler mods. If it doesn't add FPS or function, it's not here. * **SMP Ready:** Optimized for multiplayer connectivity and voice chat. --- *Maintained by **Cortiner**.*
